cybersec.name: CyberSecSuite
cybersec.description: Main forensics SDK — 31 tools via agent-sdk in-process MCP: findings, IOCs, cases, MITRE, intel, cache, AI proxy, PoC management (stdio)

dystopian-crypto.name: Dystopian Crypto
dystopian-crypto.description: 5 crypto tools — Ed25519 key management, artifact signing/verification, key rotation (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM, stdio)

kerneldev.name: KernelDev MCP
kerneldev.description: Kernel module development — compile, load, inspect LKM; eBPF program analysis; kernel symbol lookup

playwright-stealth.name: Playwright Stealth
playwright-stealth.description: Browser automation with stealth capabilities — headless detection evasion, fingerprint randomization, proxy management (stdio)

token-optimization.name: Token Optimization
token-optimization.description: Token usage analysis and optimization — input token counting, output token estimation, prompt engineering suggestions (stdio)
